# Khafji Member

**Summary**: A Middle Cretaceous sandstone and siltstone reservoir within the Wasia Formation.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2002-elhassan|ElHassan, 2002]] studied the Khafji member in the Zuluf field.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2002-elhassan|ElHassan, 2002]] fluvially dominated deltaic facies

## Diagenetic History

- [[2002-elhassan|ElHassan, 2002]] Compaction, burial, and diagenesis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The main sand interval is dominated by laterally continuous, massive to cross-bedded sandstones. ([[2002-elhassan|ElHassan, 2002, p. 28]])
